title: Carbon Offset
summary: A retreat photo hides a compressed evidence bundle after the real JPEG footer.
scenario: An employee retreat photo looks ordinary at first glance, but the file still carries hidden bytes beyond the legitimate image end marker. Solvers need to confirm where the JPEG actually ends, carve the appended payload, and extract the recovered evidence package to obtain the flag.
learningObjectives: Recover appended evidence from a seemingly normal media file

artifacts.name: retreat_photo_<seed>.jpg
artifacts.purpose: Generated JPEG with an appended archive payload

hints: A JPEG should stop after its normal footer.
Check the tail of the file instead of only viewing the image.

llmHandoff.scope: This folder contains the metadata, generator, and internal notes for the challenge.
llmHandoff.implementNext: Tune the generated image theme, decoy archive contents, or solver briefing while keeping the append-and-carve solve path intact.
llmHandoff.doNotDoYet: Do not expose the real flag in plaintext metadata or portal frontend files.
